title: rubus nanus
intro: Rubus nanus, also known as the Dwarf Raspberry or Alpine Raspberry, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to the alpine regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its high content of tannins and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Rubus nanus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Rubus nanus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat wounds and skin conditions.
